items.title: Curcumin relieves gas explosion-induced brain injury via TLR4-mediated M2 polarization of microglia.
items.authors: Xinwen Dong; Cuiying Li; Zheng Luo; Yue Ma; Jie Gao; Lvfei Deng; Xiaoran Ma; Jiahang Yang
items.abstract: INTRODUCTION: Acute microglia-mediated neuroinflammation and oxidative stress play important roles in the pathogenesis of gas explosion (GE)-induced traumatic brain injury (TBI). Curcumin has documented neuroinflammatory protective properties; however, its effects on gas explosion (GE)-induced TBI and the underlying mechanism remain unclear. MATERIALS AND METHODS: In this study, we established a male rat model of acute TBI and an in vitro model of acute microglial impact injury using shockwave physiotherapy. The effects of curcumin on the extent of the brain injury, as well as the levels of inflammatory cytokines, oxidative stress indicators, microglia polarization, and toll-like receptor 4 (TLR4) protein expression in model rats and microglial cells were evaluated using histological staining, western blotting, qPCR, immunohistochemistry, immunofluorescence, and biochemical assays. RESULTS: The results showed that curcumin reduced the pathological changes induced by GE and significantly inhibited the expression of neuron-specific enolase (NSE) (P < 0.05), a marker of microglial activation. Curcumin treatment also promoted M2 polarization of microglia (P < 0.05) and reduced the protein expression levels of TLR4, myeloid differentiation factor 88 (MyD88), NF-κB (P < 0.05), and the pro-inflammatory factors tumor necrosis factor-α (TNF-α), interleukin (IL)-1β, IL-6, and NLRP3 (P < 0.05). Moreover, curcumin treatment significantly reduced the levels of oxidative stress factors in rat tissues (P < 0.05). CONCLUSIONS: In summary, our findings indicated that curcumin alleviated acute neuroinflammation and oxidative stress induced by GE in vivo and in vitro by inhibiting TLR4-mediated M2 polarization of microglia, thus providing a new treatment target for the neuroinflammation associated with TBI caused by explosives.
items.title_en: Curcumin relieves gas explosion-induced brain injury via TLR4-mediated M2 polarization of microglia.
items.title_cn: 姜黄素通过 TLR4 介导的小胶质细胞 M2 极化缓解气体爆炸引起的脑损伤。
items.abstract_cn: 简介：急性小胶质细胞介导的神经炎症和氧化应激在气体爆炸（GE）诱发的创伤性脑损伤（TBI）的发病机制中发挥重要作用。姜黄素具有神经炎症保护特性；然而，其对瓦斯爆炸（GE）引起的 TBI 的影响及其潜在机制仍不清楚。材料和方法：在本研究中，我们利用冲击波物理疗法建立了急性 TBI 雄性大鼠模型和急性小胶质细胞撞击损伤体外模型。采用组织学染色、蛋白质印迹、qPCR、免疫组化、免疫荧光和生化检测评估姜黄素对模型大鼠和小胶质细胞脑损伤程度以及炎性细胞因子、氧化应激指标、小胶质细胞极化和 Toll 样受体 4 (TLR4) 蛋白表达水平的影响。结果：结果显示，姜黄素可减轻GE诱导的病理变化，并显着抑制小胶质细胞活化标志物神经元特异性烯醇化酶（NSE）的表达（P < 0.05）。姜黄素治疗还促进小胶质细胞M2极化（P < 0.05），并降低TLR4、髓样分化因子88（MyD88）、NF-κB（P < 0.05）和促炎因子肿瘤坏死因子-α（TNF-α）、白细胞介素（IL）-1β、IL-6和NLRP3（P < 0.05）的蛋白表达水平。此外，姜黄素治疗显着降低了大鼠组织中氧化应激因子的水平（P < 0.05）。结论：综上所述，我们的研究结果表明，姜黄素通过抑制 TLR4 介导的小胶质细胞 M2 极化，在体内和体外减轻 GE 诱导的急性神经炎症和氧化应激，从而为爆炸物引起的 TBI 相关神经炎症提供新的治疗靶点。

items.title: Elevation of Beta-2 Microglobulin during Prion Infection is Closely Correlated with PrP
items.authors: Xiao-Xi Jia; Bing Xu; Chao Hu; Ru-Han A; Wei-Wei Zhang; Li-Ping Gao; Kang Xiao; Qi Shi
items.abstract: β2-microglobulin (B2M) is implicated in neuroinflammatory and neurodegenerative processes, but its role in prion diseases remains unclear. Here, the alterations in B2M expression and distribution as well as its correlation with PrPSc accumulation were investigated in several scrapie-infected rodent models and a prion-infected cell line. Markedly increased B2M levels were detected in the brains of prion-infected rodents at the terminal stage, as well as in the prion-infected SMB-S15 cells, with prominent colocalization with neurons and microglia. Transient overexpression of cytosolic abnormal PrP in cultured cells induced an increase in B2M, whereas the expression of wild-type PrP did not alter the B2M level. Resveratrol-induced clearance of PrPSc in SMB-S15 cells sufficiently reversed the increased level of B2M. Molecular interactions and histological spatial distributions between B2M and PrPSc were identified in scrapie-infected brains. The B2M upregulation during prion infection was independent of the MHC-I expression. Routine Western blot and ELISA failed to find significant differences in B2M levels between the cohorts of human prion disease (PrD) and non-PrD in cerebrospinal fluid (CSF), and between the cohorts of PrD and the normal population in serum. These findings suggest that prion infection and abnormal PrP accumulation induce remarkable B2M upregulation, and this interaction along with its MHC-I-independent upregulation highlights the potential of B2M in the pathological progression of prion diseases, providing a novel molecular basis for understanding prion-induced neuroinflammation.
items.title_en: Elevation of Beta-2 Microglobulin during Prion Infection is Closely Correlated with PrP
items.title_cn: 朊病毒感染期间β2微球蛋白的升高与PrP密切相关
items.abstract_cn: β2-微球蛋白 (B2M) 与神经炎症和神经退行性过程有关，但其在朊病毒疾病中的作用仍不清楚。在这里，在几种感染瘙痒病的啮齿动物模型和感染朊病毒的细胞系中研究了 B2M 表达和分布的变化及其与 PrPSc 积累的相关性。在感染朊病毒的啮齿类动物的终末期大脑以及感染朊病毒的 SMB-S15 细胞中检测到 B2M 水平显着增加，并与神经元和小胶质细胞显着共定位。培养细胞中胞质异常 PrP 的瞬时过度表达诱导 B2M 增加，而野生型 PrP 的表达不会改变 B2M 水平。白藜芦醇诱导的 SMB-S15 细胞中 PrPSc 的清除足以逆转 B2M 水平的增加。在瘙痒症感染的大脑中，鉴定了 B2M 和 PrPSc 之间的分子相互作用和组织学空间分布。朊病毒感染期间 B2M 上调与 MHC-I 表达无关。常规蛋白质印迹和 ELISA 未能发现人朊病毒病 (PrD) 组和非 PrD 组脑脊液 (CSF) 之间以及 PrD 组和正常人群血清中 B2M 水平存在显着差异。这些发现表明，朊病毒感染和异常的 PrP 积累会诱导显着的 B2M 上调，这种相互作用及其不依赖于 MHC-I 的上调凸显了 B2M 在朊病毒疾病病理进展中的潜力，为理解朊病毒诱导的神经炎症提供了新的分子基础。

items.title: Fascin1 Exacerbates Neuroinflammation and Neuronal Injury in Acute TBI by Orchestrating the AKT/mTOR, STAT3, and NF-κB Signaling Pathways.
items.authors: Wei You; Yiting Wu; Yiru Fang; Shaoshan Shen; Weiping Cai
items.abstract: BACKGROUND: Neuroinflammation drives the secondary damage following traumatic brain injury (TBI), a process largely regulated by the balance between pro-inflammatory and anti-inflammatory microglial phenotypes. Microglial activation requires rapid cytoskeletal remodeling to organize signaling complexes, yet the role of the actin-bundling protein Fascin1 in this process remains unexplored. This study investigates whether Fascin1 acts as a key upstream regulator of microglial polarization and neuroinflammatory signaling during the early stages of TBI. METHODS: We established neuroinflammation models using controlled cortical impact (CCI) in mice and LPS-stimulated BV2 cells. Fascin1 was silenced via intracerebroventricular siRNA injection in vivo and transfection in vitro. We evaluated the effects on inflammation, neuronal survival, and key signaling pathways via qRT-PCR, Western blotting, immunofluorescence, ELISA, and behavioral assessments. RESULTS: Fascin1 expression was significantly upregulated in both the injured cortex of TBI mice and LPS-activated microglia. Knockdown of Fascin1 effectively inhibited the pro-inflammatory state while enhancing the anti-inflammatory state, reducing cytokine secretion and attenuating neuronal apoptosis. In vivo, Fascin1 silencing significantly alleviated neurological deficits and reduced tissue loss. Mechanistically, Fascin1 depletion was associated with a concurrent dampening of the phosphorylation of critical inflammatory mediators, specifically AKT, mTOR, STAT3, and NF-κB p65. CONCLUSIONS: Our findings demonstrate that Fascin1 promotes neuroinflammation during acute TBI. Fascin1 appears to modulate the activity of the AKT/mTOR, STAT3, and NF-κB signaling cascades, thereby shifting microglia toward a pro-inflammatory state.
items.title_en: Fascin1 Exacerbates Neuroinflammation and Neuronal Injury in Acute TBI by Orchestrating the AKT/mTOR, STAT3, and NF-κB Signaling Pathways.
items.title_cn: Fascin1 通过协调 AKT/mTOR、STAT3 和 NF-κB 信号通路加剧急性 TBI 中的神经炎症和神经元损伤。
items.abstract_cn: 背景：神经炎症会导致创伤性脑损伤（TBI）后的继发性损伤，这一过程很大程度上受促炎和抗炎小胶质细胞表型之间的平衡调节。小胶质细胞激活需要快速的细胞骨架重塑来组织信号复合物，但肌动蛋白捆绑蛋白 Fascin1 在此过程中的作用仍未被探索。本研究调查了 Fascin1 是否在 TBI 早期阶段充当小胶质细胞极化和神经炎症信号传导的关键上游调节因子。方法：我们利用小鼠受控皮质冲击 (CCI) 和 LPS 刺激的 BV2 细胞建立了神经炎症模型。通过体内脑室内注射 siRNA 和体外转染来沉默 Fascin1。我们通过 qRT-PCR、蛋白质印迹、免疫荧光、ELISA 和行为评估评估了对炎症、神经元存活和关键信号通路的影响。结果：TBI 小鼠受损皮质和 LPS 激活的小胶质细胞中 Fascin1 表达显着上调。 Fascin1 的敲低可有效抑制促炎状态，同时增强抗炎状态，减少细胞因子分泌并减弱神经元凋亡。在体内，Fascin1 沉默可显着减轻神经缺陷并减少组织损失。从机制上讲，Fascin1 耗竭与关键炎症介质（特别是 AKT、mTOR、STAT3 和 NF-κB p65）磷酸化的同时抑制相关。结论：我们的研究结果表明，Fascin1 会促进急性 TBI 期间的神经炎症。 Fascin1 似乎可以调节 AKT/mTOR、STAT3 和 NF-κB 信号级联的活性，从而将小胶质细胞转变为促炎症状态。

items.title: Unifying the hallmarks of major depression through neuroimmune-metabolic-oxidative (NIMETOX) dysregulation: a mechanistic systems framework.
items.authors: Michael Maes; Abbas F Almulla; Drozdstoj Stoyanov; Yingqiang Zhang
items.abstract: Current state-of-the-art neuroimmune, metabolic, and oxidative stress (NIMETOX) knowledge that has been developed in clinical major depressive disorder (MDD) research over the past three decades is explored in this review. Between 1990 and 2000, the acute phase of severe MDD was characterized by the activation of T helper (Th)1 cells and M1 macrophages, leading to immune dysregulation that affects nutritional immunity and alters protein, tryptophan, iron, and lipid metabolism. The latter comprises lower high-density lipoprotein cholesterol, reverse cholesterol transport (RCT), ω3 polyunsaturated fatty acids, heightened lipid peroxidation and atherogenicity. Additionally, immune alterations regulate stress-responsive systems and modify the biological basis of depressive symptoms through neurotoxic effects and reduced neuroprotection. The incremental information acquired from 2000 to 2026 revealed that the acute phase of severe MDD is characterized by immune sensitization, imbalances between the compensatory immunoregulatory system (CIRS) and the immune-inflammatory response system (IRS) and that there are multiple interactions between increased atherogenicity, metabolic syndrome, oxidative stress, and lower antioxidant activity and RCT. Additionally, the NIMETOX pathway may be fuelled by increased expression of TLR4 and NF-κB intracellular signaling driven by increased lipopolysaccharides, lipids, and oxidatively modified epitopes. This paper presents evidence that peripheral NIMETOX pathways may lead to neuroinflammation, microglial activation, and neuronal damage and that increased lipid load impairs these central pathways. This paper assesses the field's future advancements by conducting a comprehensive examination of the reviewed knowledge base, deep phenotyping, panomics methodologies, and machine learning techniques, including the nomothetic precision approach.
items.title_en: Unifying the hallmarks of major depression through neuroimmune-metabolic-oxidative (NIMETOX) dysregulation: a mechanistic systems framework.
items.title_cn: 通过神经免疫代谢氧化（NIMETOX）失调统一重度抑郁症的特征：机械系统框架。
items.abstract_cn: 本综述探讨了过去三十年来在临床重度抑郁症 (MDD) 研究中发展起来的当前最先进的神经免疫、代谢和氧化应激 (NIMETOX) 知识。 1990年至2000年间，严重MDD急性期的特点是辅助性T细胞(Th)1和M1巨噬细胞的激活，导致免疫失调，影响营养免疫并改变蛋白质、色氨酸、铁和脂质代谢。后者包括降低高密度脂蛋白胆固醇、反向胆固醇转运 (RCT)、ω3 多不饱和脂肪酸、增强的脂质过氧化和致动脉粥样硬化性。此外，免疫改变可调节应激反应系统，并通过神经毒性作用和减少神经保护来改变抑郁症状的生物学基础。 2000年至2026年获得的增量信息表明，严重MDD急性期的特点是免疫敏化、代偿性免疫调节系统（CIRS）和免疫炎症反应系统（IRS）之间的失衡，并且动脉粥样硬化性增加、代谢综合征、氧化应激和抗氧化活性降低与RCT之间存在多种相互作用。此外，脂多糖、脂质和氧化修饰表位增加驱动的 TLR4 和 NF-κB 细胞内信号表达增加可能会促进 NIMETOX 途径。本文提出的证据表明，外周 NIMETOX 通路可能导致神经炎症、小胶质细胞激活和神经元损伤，并且脂质负荷增加会损害这些中枢通路。本文通过对所审查的知识库、深度表型分析、全景组学方法和机器学习技术（包括规则精确方法）进行全面检查，评估了该领域的未来进展。

items.title: Harnessing liver-heart crosstalk via extracellular vesicle-mediated hepatic delivery of microRNAs for cardiac repair.
items.authors: Ji-Young Kang; Dasom Mun; Gyeongseo Yoo; Malgeum Park; Jaewoong Lee; Seyong Chung; Nuri Yun; Boyoung Joung
items.abstract: Extracellular vesicles (EVs) hold great potential to deliver microRNAs (miRNAs) in vivo; however, its preferential hepatic accumulation after systemic administration hinders the therapeutic efficacy of miRNAs. Inter-organ communication via endocrine factors is crucial for maintaining physiological homeostasis. Herein, this study leveraged liver-heart crosstalk to overcome the hepatic tropism of EVs and reframe it as a therapeutic advantage for cardiac injury. In a mouse model of angiotensin II (Ang II)-induced cardiac injury, liver tissues showed distinct changes in inflammation-related proteins compared with saline-treated controls, indicating hepatic involvement in cardiac injury. To establish a liver-heart crosstalk-based therapeutic approach, EV@miR-155 were prepared by loading miRNA-155 into mesenchymal stem cell-derived EVs. After intravenous administration, EV@miR-155 predominantly accumulated in the liver, increased hepatic miRNA-155 levels, and remodeled the hepatic microenvironment. This remodeling suppressed PPARα-mediated production of fibroblast growth factor 21 (FGF21), a hepatokine implicated in cardiac pathophysiology, thereby establishing a liver-heart crosstalk axis. Remarkably, EV@miR-155 treatment significantly improved cardiac function and reduced myocardial fibrosis and hypertrophy without inducing systemic toxicity (P < 0.05). Therefore, this study provides a conceptual shift by transforming the natural hepatic tropism of EVs-traditionally regarded as a delivery limitation-into a therapeutic route that enables liver-heart crosstalk-mediated cardiac repair.
items.title_en: Harnessing liver-heart crosstalk via extracellular vesicle-mediated hepatic delivery of microRNAs for cardiac repair.
items.title_cn: 通过细胞外囊泡介导的肝脏递送 microRNA 来利用肝心串扰进行心脏修复。
items.abstract_cn: 细胞外囊泡 (EV) 具有在体内传递 microRNA (miRNA) 的巨大潜力；然而，全身给药后其优先在肝脏积聚阻碍了 miRNA 的治疗效果。通过内分泌因子进行的器官间通讯对于维持生理稳态至关重要。在此，本研究利用肝心串扰来克服 EV 的肝向性，并将其重新定义为心脏损伤的治疗优势。在血管紧张素 II (Ang II) 诱导的心脏损伤的小鼠模型中，与盐水处理的对照组相比，肝组织中炎症相关蛋白出现明显变化，表明肝脏参与了心脏损伤。为了建立基于肝心串扰的治疗方法，通过将 miRNA-155 加载到间充质干细胞衍生的 EV 中来制备 EV@miR-155。静脉注射后，EV@miR-155主要在肝脏中积累，增加肝脏miRNA-155水平，并重塑肝脏微环境。这种重塑抑制了 PPARα 介导的成纤维细胞生长因子 21 (FGF21)（一种与心脏病理生理学有关的肝因子）的产生，从而建立了肝-心串扰轴。值得注意的是，EV@miR-155 治疗显着改善了心脏功能，减少了心肌纤维化和肥厚，且不引起全身毒性（P < 0.05）。因此，这项研究提供了概念上的转变，将 EV 的自然向肝性（传统上被视为递送限制）转变为能够实现肝-心串扰介导的心脏修复的治疗途径。

items.title: A biomimetic cryoprotectant preserves extracellular vesicles bioactivity for intravenous administration and potentiates wound healing.
items.authors: Pingao Zhang; Xinkai Nie; Hongwei Mao; Youyou Zhang; Jing Wang; Lufeng Wang; Rui Qin; Xiaoli Yang
items.abstract: Extracellular vesicles (EVs) have emerged as promising vehicles for drug delivery and disease therapy owing to their intrinsic biocompatibility and capacity to transfer functional biomolecules. However, limitations in current storage technologies, including structural degradation and bioactivity loss during long-term freezing, and the incompatibility of conventional cryoprotectants such as DMSO and glycerol with intravenous administration, pose major barriers to clinical translation. Herein, we developed DDAS, a biomimetic cryoprotectant formulation, rationally designed through generative artificial intelligence (GAI)-assisted prioritization of physiologically relevant candidates from the Human Metabolome Database. DDAS comprises dextran, albumin, and sialic acid, which were selected for their synergistic stabilization and inherent biocompatibility. Compared with standard preservation media, DDAS markedly improved EVs stability during prolonged cryopreservation and repeated freeze-thaw cycles, effectively preserving vesicle morphology, particle concentration, and cargo protein functionality while reducing aggregation and membrane damage. Notably, DDAS exhibited negligible cytotoxicity and excellent biocompatibility, enabling direct intravenous administration without re-isolation or washing. Importantly, stem cell-derived EVs preserved in DDAS fully retained their therapeutic activity in vivo, significantly attenuating inflammation and accelerating wound repair upon systemic administration. Together, this study develops and validates DDAS, a practical, clinically feasible biomimetic cryoprotectant assisted by GAI. DDAS enables the long‑term preservation of EVs with intact functionality and significantly enhances the therapeutic efficacy of stem cell EVs in wound healing, ultimately unlocking their full clinical potential.
items.title_en: A biomimetic cryoprotectant preserves extracellular vesicles bioactivity for intravenous administration and potentiates wound healing.

items.abstract_cn: 细胞外囊泡（EV）由于其固有的生物相容性和转移功能性生物分子的能力，已成为药物输送和疾病治疗的有前途的载体。然而，当前储存技术的局限性，包括长期冷冻过程中的结构降解和生物活性损失，以及传统冷冻保护剂（如DMSO和甘油）与静脉注射的不相容性，对临床转化构成了主要障碍。在此，我们开发了 DDAS，一种仿生冷冻保护剂配方，通过生成人工智能 (GAI) 辅助对人类代谢组数据库中生理相关候选物的优先级进行合理设计。 DDAS 包含葡聚糖、白蛋白和唾液酸，它们的选择是因为它们具有协同稳定性和固有的生物相容性。与标准保存介质相比，DDAS 显着提高了 EV 在长时间冷冻保存和反复冻融循环过程中的稳定性，有效保留囊泡形态、颗粒浓度和货物蛋白功能，同时减少聚集和膜损伤。值得注意的是，DDAS 表现出可忽略不计的细胞毒性和优异的生物相容性，无需重新分离或清洗即可直接静脉内给药。重要的是，保存在 DDAS 中的干细胞来源的 EV 在体内完全保留了其治疗活性，在全身给药后显着减轻炎症并加速伤口修复。这项研究共同开发并验证了 DDAS，这是一种在 GAI 辅助下实用的、临床上可行的仿生冷冻保护剂。 DDAS 能够长期保存功能完整的 EV，并显着增强干细胞 EV 在伤口愈合中的治疗功效，最终释放其全部临床潜力。

items.title: Nr1d1 Mediates Microglial Inflammatory Activation Induced by Intermittent Hypoxia: A Transcriptomic and Machine Learning Study.
items.authors: Zhuoran Sun; Tengqun Shen; Mengfan Li; Jinbiao Zhang; Zhenguang Li; Fangzhou Ma
items.abstract: Obstructive sleep apnea is characterized by recurrent intermittent hypoxia (IH), which contributes to neuroinflammation and neurological dysfunction. Microglia are pivotal regulators of inflammatory responses in the central nervous system, but the molecular mechanisms underlying IH-induced microglial activation remain unclear. This study aimed to identify key genes mediating this phenomenon and to elucidate their functional significance. An IH model was established in BV2 cells, with inflammation assessed via western blot for cyclooxygenase-2 (COX2) /inducible nitric oxide synthase (iNOS) and ELISA for Interleukin-6 (IL-6) /Tumour necrosis factor-alpha (TNF-α). RNA sequencing was performed to profile transcriptional changes induced by IH. Differential expression analysis, functional enrichment analysis, protein interaction network analysis, transcription factor prediction, and machine learning-based screening were integrated to identify candidate key genes. Pharmacological modulation of Nr1d1 was then performed to evaluate its role in IH-induced inflammation. IH significantly increased COX2, iNOS, IL-6 and TNF-α levels in BV2 cells. Transcriptomics showed distinct profiles between control and IH groups. Enrichment analyses linked IH-related genes to immune regulation, stress responses, and metabolic pathways. Network analysis highlighted a circadian gene cluster as a prominent component of the IH-responsive transcriptional network. Integrated network and machine learning analyses further identified Nr1d1 as a key candidate. Pharmacological experiments showed that inhibition of Nr1d1 attenuated IH-induced inflammatory responses. IH induces pronounced inflammatory activation and transcriptional reprogramming in BV2 cells. Nr1d1 may represent a circadian-associated candidate regulator involved in IH-induced microglial inflammatory activation.
items.title_en: Nr1d1 Mediates Microglial Inflammatory Activation Induced by Intermittent Hypoxia: A Transcriptomic and Machine Learning Study.
items.title_cn: Nr1d1 介导间歇性缺氧诱导的小胶质细胞炎症激活：一项转录组学和机器学习研究。
items.abstract_cn: 阻塞性睡眠呼吸暂停的特点是反复间歇性缺氧 (IH)，这会导致神经炎症和神经功能障碍。小胶质细胞是中枢神经系统炎症反应的关键调节因子，但 IH 诱导小胶质细胞激活的分子机制仍不清楚。本研究旨在确定介导这种现象的关键基因并阐明其功能意义。在 BV2 细胞中建立 IH 模型，通过环氧合酶 2 (COX2)/诱导型一氧化氮合酶 (iNOS) 的蛋白质印迹和白细胞介素 6 (IL-6)/肿瘤坏死因子-α (TNF-α) 的 ELISA 评估炎症。通过 RNA 测序来分析 IH 诱导的转录变化。整合差异表达分析、功能富集分析、蛋白质相互作用网络分析、转录因子预测和基于机器学习的筛选来识别候选关键基因。然后对 Nr1d1 进行药理学调节，以评估其在 IH 诱导的炎症中的作用。 IH 显着增加 BV2 细胞中 COX2、iNOS、IL-6 和 TNF-α 的水平。转录组学显示对照组和 IH 组之间存在明显差异。富集分析将 IH 相关基因与免疫调节、应激反应和代谢途径联系起来。网络分析强调昼夜节律基因簇是 IH 响应转录网络的重要组成部分。综合网络和机器学习分析进一步确定 Nr1d1 为关键候选者。药理学实验表明，抑制 Nr1d1 可减弱 IH 诱导的炎症反应。 IH 在 BV2 细胞中诱导明显的炎症激活和转录重编程。 Nr1d1 可能代表参与 IH 诱导的小胶质细胞炎症激活的昼夜节律相关候选调节因子。

items.title: Targeted Degradation of STING by a Neutrophil Membrane-Coated Nanoplatform Suppresses Microglial Pyroptosis After Subarachnoid Hemorrhage.
items.authors: Ruotian Zhang; Kaikun Yuan; Haoyu Zou; Hanfeng Qin; Jiale Liu; Jianda Sun; Feifan Zhang; Yuankui Wang
items.abstract: Subarachnoid hemorrhage (SAH) is a life-threatening cerebrovascular disease in which neuroinflammation and neuronal death critically contribute to poor outcomes. Here, we identify aberrant STING activation as a key driver of microglial pyroptosis and post-SAH injury. Transcriptomic and biochemical analyses support a close association between STING signaling and microglial pyroptosis, with MAPK signaling acting as a functionally relevant downstream pathway. Based on this mechanistic insight, we engineered MG1 peptide-functionalized, neutrophil membrane-coated STING-PROTAC nanoparticles (MG1@NM-Px) to enable blood-brain barrier penetration, microglia-targeted delivery, and efficient STING degradation in vivo. This catalytic degradation suppressed the inflammasome-related activation and GSDME-associated pyroptotic signaling, reduced pro-inflammatory cytokine secretion, and prevented neuronal apoptosis. Histopathological examination showed preserved Nissl body integrity, while behavioral testing revealed significant improvements in neurological function. Collectively, this engineered neutrophil membrane-coated STING-PROTAC nanoplatform effectively degrades STING, inhibits microglial pyroptosis, and provides robust neuroprotection in SAH. This work establishes a novel biomimetic nanomedicine strategy for SAH therapy and opens new avenues for treating neuroinflammation-related disorders.
items.title_en: Targeted Degradation of STING by a Neutrophil Membrane-Coated Nanoplatform Suppresses Microglial Pyroptosis After Subarachnoid Hemorrhage.
items.title_cn: 中性粒细胞膜涂层纳米平台靶向降解 STING 可抑制蛛网膜下腔出血后小胶质细胞焦亡。
items.abstract_cn: 蛛网膜下腔出血（SAH）是一种危及生命的脑血管疾病，其中神经炎症和神经元死亡严重导致不良预后。在这里，我们确定异常的 STING 激活是小胶质细胞焦亡和 SAH 后损伤的关键驱动因素。转录组和生化分析支持 STING 信号传导与小胶质细胞焦亡之间的密切关联，其中 MAPK 信号传导作为功能相关的下游途径。基于这一机制见解，我们设计了 MG1 肽功能化、中性粒细胞膜包被的 STING-PROTAC 纳米粒子 (MG1@NM-Px)，以实现血脑屏障穿透、小胶质细胞靶向递送和体内有效的 STING 降解。这种催化降解抑制了炎症小体相关的激活和 GSDME 相关的焦亡信号传导，减少了促炎细胞因子的分泌，并防止了神经元凋亡。组织病理学检查显示尼氏体完整性得以保留，而行为测试显示神经功能显着改善。总的来说，这种工程化的中性粒细胞膜包被的 STING-PROTAC 纳米平台可以有效降解 STING，抑制小胶质细胞焦亡，并为 SAH 提供强大的神经保护。这项工作为 SAH 治疗建立了一种新颖的仿生纳米医学策略，并为治疗神经炎症相关疾病开辟了新途径。

核心发现：蛛网膜下腔出血（SAH）是一种危及生命的脑血管疾病，其中神经炎症和神经元死亡严重导致不良预后。在这里，我们确定异常的 STING 激活是小胶质细胞焦亡和 SAH 后损伤的关键驱动因素。转录组和生化分析支持 STING 信号传导与小胶质细胞焦亡之间的密切关联，其中 MAPK 信号传导作为功能相关的下游途径。基于这一机制见解，我们设计了 MG1 肽功能化、中性粒细胞膜包被的 STING-PROTAC 纳米粒子 (MG1@NM-Px)，以实现血脑屏障穿透、小胶质细胞靶向递送和体内有效的 STING 降解。这种催化降解抑制了炎症小体相关的激活和 GSDME 相关的焦亡信号传导，减少了促炎细胞因子的分泌，并防止了神经元凋亡。组织病理学检查显示尼氏体完整性得以保留，而行为测试显示神经功能显着改善。总的来说，这种工程化的中性粒细胞膜包被的 STING-PROTAC 纳米平台可以有效降解 STING，抑制小胶质细胞焦亡，并为 SAH 提供强大的神经保护。这项工作为 SAH 治疗建立了一种新颖的仿生纳米医学策略，并为治疗神经炎症相关疾病开辟了新途径。

items.title: Brain-derived extracellular vesicle (BDEV) abundance and BDEV protein associations with clinical phenotypes and treatment response in untreated first-episode psychosis.
items.authors: Lusi Zhang; Adam M Lee; Zia L Maxim; Manjula Munirathinam; Bart S Larsen; Michael K Georgieff; Sarah K Keedy; James L Reilly
items.abstract: Reliable biomarkers that capture central nervous system (CNS) processes during the earliest stages of psychosis remain critically needed for more effective early treatment and monitoring response to therapy. Brain-derived extracellular vesicles (BDEVs) that traverse the blood-brain barrier (BBB) can be isolated from peripheral blood, thereby offering a novel and minimally invasive approach to quantify CNS molecular biomarkers. We hypothesized that BDEV abundance and BDEV neuroinflammatory and neurotrophic protein cargo would differ between individuals with first-episode psychosis (FEP) and healthy controls (HCs), reflecting altered neuroinflammatory processes and vesicle trafficking associated with psychosis and clinical outcomes. In a cohort of antipsychotic-naïve individuals with FEP (n = 57) and HCs (n = 28), BDEVs were isolated from serum. Luminex assays quantified concentrations of brain-derived neurotrophic factor (BDNF), S100 calcium-binding protein B (S100B), and C-reactive protein (CRP), in BDEVs and serum. A subset of FEP participants (n = 34) subsequently completed four weeks of antipsychotic treatment. Group differences in BDEV characteristics, protein measures, and their associations with diagnosis, baseline symptoms, and four-week symptom change were quantified. FEP participants showed a trend toward higher BDEV concentration than HCs (median 14.0x109 versus 10.2x109 particles/mL, p = 0.052), and higher baseline BDEV concentrations were significantly associated with more severe pretreatment symptoms (β = 4.09x10-10, p = 0.003) and greater symptom improvement after four-week antipsychotic treatment (β = 3.29x10-10, p = 0.029). Within BDEVs, BDNF (β = -1.05; p = 0.002) and CRP (CRP; β = -0.84; p = 0.002) were significantly reduced in FEP vs HC, with a trend for S100B (β = -0.57; p = 0.061). In contrast, serum protein levels showed no case-control differences and did not correlate with BDEV cargo. Lower baseline BDEV BDNF, S100B, and CRP predicted greater therapeutic response in males. BDEVs offer a minimally invasive window into CNS-specific biology in early psychosis. BDEV abundance and neuroinflammatory/neurotrophic cargo concentrations show illness-severity and sex-dependent associations not detectable in serum, supporting their potential as biomarkers for early pathophysiology and treatment response in FEP.

items.title_cn: 脑源性细胞外囊泡 (BDEV) 丰度和 BDEV 蛋白与未经治疗的首发精神病的临床表型和治疗反应的关联。
items.abstract_cn: 为了更有效的早期治疗和监测治疗反应，仍然迫切需要捕捉精神病早期阶段中枢神经系统（CNS）过程的可靠生物标志物。可以从外周血中分离出穿过血脑屏障（BBB）的脑源性细胞外囊泡（BDEV），从而提供一种新颖的微创方法来量化中枢神经系统分子生物标志物。我们假设首发精神病 (FEP) 和健康对照 (HC) 个体之间的 BDEV 丰度以及 BDEV 神经炎症和神经营养蛋白货物会有所不同，反映了与精神病和临床结果相关的神经炎症过程和囊泡运输的改变。在一组患有 FEP（n = 57）和 HC（n = 28）的未接受过抗精神病药物治疗的个体中，从血清中分离出 BDEV。 Luminex 测定 BDEV 和血清中脑源性神经营养因子 (BDNF)、S100 钙结合蛋白 B (S100B) 和 C 反应蛋白 (CRP) 的定量浓度。 FEP 参与者的一个子集（n = 34）随后完成了四个星期的抗精神病药物治疗。对 BDEV 特征、蛋白质测量值及其与诊断、基线症状和 4 周症状变化的关联进行了量化。 FEP 参与者表现出比 HC 更高的 BDEV 浓度趋势（中位数为 14.0x109 与 10.2x109 颗粒/mL，p = 0.052），并且较高的基线 BDEV 浓度与更严重的治疗前症状显着相关（β = 4.09x10-10，p = 0.003），并且在 4 周抗精神病药物治疗后症状改善更大（β = 3.29x10-10，p = 0.029）。在 BDEV 中，与 HC 相比，FEP 中的 BDNF（β = -1.05；p = 0.002）和 CRP（CRP；β = -0.84；p = 0.002）显着降低，S100B 也有这种趋势（β = -0.57；p = 0.061）。相比之下，血清蛋白水平没有表现出病例对照差异，并且与 BDEV 货物不相关。较低的基线 BDEV、BDNF、S100B 和 CRP 预示着男性的治疗反应更大。 BDEV 为了解早期精神病中中枢神经系统特异性生物学提供了一个微创窗口。 BDEV 丰度和神经炎症/神经营养物质浓度表明疾病……

items.title: Safety and preliminary efficacy of autologous bone marrow-derived mesenchymal stem cell transplantation in hereditary cerebellar ataxia: phase I/IIa clinical trial.
items.authors: Abbas Shapouri Moghaddam; Jalil Tavakol-Afshari; Najmeh Kaffash Farkhad; Majid Mojarrad; Maryam Eslami; Shahram Savad; Mohammad Ali Khodadoust; Ala Orafaie
items.abstract: BACKGROUND: Hereditary cerebellar ataxias (HCA) encompass a spectrum of pathological conditions affecting the cerebellum. Currently, there is growing interest in the potential role of mesenchymal stem cells (MSCs) as an investigational therapeutic approach for this condition. Hence, the objective of this single-center, open-label, phase I/IIa clinical trial was to assess the safety and exploratory clinical and biomarker changes following a single intrathecal injection of autologous bone marrow-derived mesenchymal stem cells (BM-MSCs) in HCA. METHODS: Ten confirmed patients with HCA entered the study and underwent a single dose of (1 × 106 cells/kg BW) intrathecal transplantation of BM-MSCs at passage 3. During the follow-up, patients were evaluated four times (one month before the intervention (-1), months 1, 3, and 6). Assessments included safety evaluation, Scale for the Assessment and Rating of Ataxia (SARA), GAD 65-antibody, and specific cytokines in the patient's serum and cerebrospinal fluid (CSF) samples. RESULTS: No severe adverse effects were observed following the cell transplantation procedure. A decreasing trend in SARA score was observed, with a statistically significant difference at month 6 compared with baseline. Except for one patient, GAD-65 antibody levels remained within the normal range in all patients. In one patient with markedly elevated baseline GAD-65 titers, serum and CSF GAD-65 levels decreased from 814 IU/mL and 781 IU/mL, respectively, to values within the normal range after 3 months. Significant changes were observed in selected inflammatory biomarkers, including decreased serum IL-6 at month 3, decreased CSF TNF-alpha at months 1 and 3, and increased serum IL-10 during follow-up. CSF IL-6 did not show a significant decrease. CONCLUSION: The findings support the short-term safety and tolerability of a single intrathecal dose of autologous BM-MSCs in this small HCA cohort. The study provides preliminary signals of possible clinical and biomarker changes; however, efficacy cannot be established due to the uncontrolled design, small sample size, disease heterogeneity, and short follow-up. Larger randomized controlled trials are required to validate these exploratory findings. TRIAL REGISTRATION: This clinical trial was registered with the Iranian Registry of Clinical Trials (ID: IRCT20160809029275N3).
items.title_en: Safety and preliminary efficacy of autologous bone marrow-derived mesenchymal stem cell transplantation in hereditary cerebellar ataxia: phase I/IIa clinical trial.
items.title_cn: 自体骨髓间充质干细胞移植治疗遗传性小脑共济失调的安全性和初步疗效：I/IIa 期临床试验。
items.abstract_cn: 背景：遗传性小脑性共济失调（HCA）涵盖一系列影响小脑的病理状况。目前，人们越来越关注间充质干细胞（MSC）作为这种疾病的研究性治疗方法的潜在作用。因此，这项单中心、开放标签、I/IIa 期临床试验的目的是评估 HCA 中单次鞘内注射自体骨髓间充质干细胞 (BM-MSC) 后的安全性和探索性临床和生物标志物变化。方法：10 例确诊的 HCA 患者进入研究，并在第 3 代接受单剂（1 × 106 个细胞/kg BW）鞘内 BM-MSC 移植。随访期间，对患者进行四次评估（干预前 1 个月（-1）、第 1、3 和 6 个月）。评估包括安全性评估、共济失调评估和评级量表 (SARA)、GAD 65 抗体以及患者血清和脑脊液 (CSF) 样本中的特定细胞因子。结果：细胞移植过程后没有观察到严重的不良反应。观察到 SARA 评分呈下降趋势，与基线相比，第 6 个月时有统计学显着差异。除一名患者外，所有患者的GAD-65抗体水平均保持在正常范围内。在一名基线 GAD-65 滴度显着升高的患者中，血清和脑脊液 GAD-65 水平分别从 814 IU/mL 和 781 IU/mL 下降至 3 个月后的正常范围内的值。在选定的炎症生物标志物中观察到显着变化，包括第 3 个月血清 IL-6 降低、第 1 个月和第 3 个月 CSF TNF-α 降低以及随访期间血清 IL-10 升高。 CSF IL-6没有表现出显着下降。结论：研究结果支持在这个小型 HCA 队列中单次鞘内注射剂量的自体 BM-MSC 的短期安全性和耐受性。该研究提供了可能的临床和生物标志物变化的初步信号；然而，由于设计不受控制、样本量小、疾病异质性和随访时间短，无法确定疗效。需要更大规模的随机对照试验……

top_journal_neuroscience.title: Microglial TDP-43 mediates myelin refinement and represses Tyrobp cryptic exon inclusion in mice.
top_journal_neuroscience.authors: Anne-Claire Compagnion; Andranik Ivanov; Anil Rana; Felipe Espinoza; Thomas Sandmann; Fanny S Martineau; Katia Monsorno; Roberta Facchinetti
top_journal_neuroscience.abstract: TDP-43 proteinopathy is a hallmark of neurodegenerative disorders such as amyotrophic lateral sclerosis and frontotemporal dementia where mislocalization of TDP-43 has been observed in neurons and glial cells. However, the role of TDP-43 in microglia and the consequences of its loss of function remain unexplored. Combining magnetic resonance imaging, and confocal, and electron microscopy, we uncovered structural changes and myelin abnormalities in the early postnatal brain of mice lacking microglial TDP-43. Spatial transcriptomics further revealed an enriched interferon-responsive signature associated with oligodendrocyte dysfunction. Early depletion of microglial TDP-43 led to motor deficits in adult mice. Mechanistically, knocking out TDP-43 impaired microglial ability to engulf and degrade myelin. It also led to cryptic exon inclusion in the Tyrobp mRNA, resulting in truncated DAP12 protein, thus causing defective TREM2 signaling. Our findings reveal a role for TDP-43 in regulating the TREM2-DAP12 axis in mice, highlighting a previously unrecognized mechanism through which TDP-43 controls microglial function.
top_journal_neuroscience.title_en: Microglial TDP-43 mediates myelin refinement and represses Tyrobp cryptic exon inclusion in mice.
top_journal_neuroscience.title_cn: 小胶质细胞 TDP-43 介导小鼠髓磷脂细化并抑制 Tyrobp 隐性外显子包含。
top_journal_neuroscience.abstract_cn: TDP-43蛋白病是神经退行性疾病的标志，例如肌萎缩侧索硬化症和额颞叶痴呆，其中在神经元和神经胶质细胞中观察到TDP-43的错误定位。然而，TDP-43 在小胶质细胞中的作用及其功能丧失的后果仍有待探索。结合磁共振成像、共聚焦和电子显微镜，我们发现了缺乏小胶质细胞 TDP-43 的小鼠出生后早期大脑的结构变化和髓磷脂异常。空间转录组学进一步揭示了与少突胶质细胞功能障碍相关的丰富的干扰素反应特征。小胶质细胞 TDP-43 的早期消耗导致​​成年小鼠运动缺陷。从机制上讲，敲除 TDP-43 会损害小胶质细胞吞噬和降解髓磷脂的能力。它还导致 Tyrobp mRNA 中包含隐秘的外显子，导致 DAP12 蛋白被截短，从而导致 TREM2 信号传导缺陷。我们的研究结果揭示了 TDP-43 在调节小鼠 TREM2-DAP12 轴中的作用，强调了 TDP-43 控制小胶质细胞功能的先前未被认识的机制。

top_journal_neuroscience.title: Recent Advances and Future Prospects in Gene Delivery Platforms for Glioblastoma: A Review.
top_journal_neuroscience.authors: Alexander F Haddad; Rithvik Ramesh; Jorge Armando Peña Agudelo; Christopher Salha; Pranav Prakash; Shreya R Aghi; James S Trippett; Maria G Castro
top_journal_neuroscience.abstract: IMPORTANCE: Glioblastoma (GBM) remains a disease with high mortality despite treatment with maximal safe surgical resection, radiation, and temozolomide. Standard of care for GBM has remained unchanged for decades. Gene therapies using both viral and nonviral platforms have the potential to significantly improve outcomes but have faced challenges related to delivery, intratumoral heterogeneity, and immunologic limitations. OBSERVATIONS: This review discusses the most recent progress in genetic therapies for gliomas, with a focus on clinical platforms and those nearing clinical translation. Oncolytic and nonlytic replicating viral therapies remain the most clinically advanced, with adeno-associated virus and nonviral systems approaching clinical translation. Treatment efficacy has been variable across trials, platforms, and payloads. Oncolytic herpes simplex virus (G47Δ, teserpaturev) has been conditionally approved for the treatment of gliomas in Japan, while next-generation constructs show a potential association between immunologic activation and survival. Common challenges include the verification and quantification of delivery efficiency, the balance between antivector and antitumor immunity, appropriately designed clinical trials, relevant modeling of vector behavior in the preclinical setting, regulatory clearance, and manufacturing. CONCLUSIONS AND RELEVANCE: Understanding the potential and limitations of gene therapies for gliomas is vital in navigating the path forward for these promising therapies. The future of these treatments will focus on improved clinical trial design with rapid confirmation and tracking of delivery, biomarker feedback and assay optimization, and combination strategies. A focus on delivery platform development can compress iteration cycles and lead to therapeutic benefit for patients with gliomas and other solid tumors.
top_journal_neuroscience.title_en: Recent Advances and Future Prospects in Gene Delivery Platforms for Glioblastoma: A Review.
top_journal_neuroscience.title_cn: 胶质母细胞瘤基因传递平台的最新进展和未来前景：综述。
top_journal_neuroscience.abstract_cn: 重要性：尽管采用最大程度安全的手术切除、放疗和替莫唑胺进行治疗，胶质母细胞瘤 (GBM) 仍然是一种死亡率较高的疾病。 GBM 的护理标准几十年来一直保持不变。使用病毒和非病毒平台的基因疗法有可能显着改善结果，但面临与递送、瘤内异质性和免疫学限制相关的挑战。观察：这篇综述讨论了神经胶质瘤基因治疗的最新进展，重点是临床平台和接近临床转化的平台。溶瘤和非裂解复制病毒疗法仍然是临床上最先进的，腺相关病毒和非病毒系统已接近临床转化。治疗效果因试验、平台和有效负载而异。溶瘤单纯疱疹病毒（G47Δ，teserpaturev）已在日本有条件批准用于治疗神经胶质瘤，而下一代构建体显示出免疫激活和生存之间的潜在关联。常见的挑战包括传递效率的验证和量化、抗载体和抗肿瘤免疫之间的平衡、适当设计的临床试验、临床前环境中载体行为的相关建模、监管许可和制造。结论和相关性：了解神经胶质瘤基因疗法的潜力和局限性对于探索这些有前途的疗法的前进道路至关重要。这些治疗的未来将侧重于改进临床试验设计，包括快速确认和跟踪给药、生物标志物反馈和测定优化以及组合策略。专注于交付平台开发可以压缩迭代周期，并为神经胶质瘤和其他实体瘤患者带来治疗益处。

top_journal_neuroscience.title: Anti-LAG-3 with or without anti-PD-1 in recurrent glioblastoma: a phase 1 trial.
top_journal_neuroscience.authors: Michael Lim; Xiaobu Ye; Anna F Piotrowski; Arati Desai; Manmeet S Ahluwalia; Tobias Walbert; Glenn Lesser; Benjamin M Ellingson
top_journal_neuroscience.abstract: Lymphocyte activation gene 3 (LAG-3) is an immune checkpoint implicated in T cell exhaustion and a potential therapeutic target in glioblastoma (GBM). We conducted a multicenter, open-label, phase 1 study with sequential allocation to evaluate the safety and preliminary activity of the anti-LAG-3 antibody relatlimab, administered alone or with the anti-programmed cell death protein 1 (PD-1) antibody nivolumab, in patients with recurrent GBM. Forty-six patients were treated (23 per cohort). The primary endpoint of safety was met, with maximum tolerated doses of 800 mg relatlimab for monotherapy and 160 mg relatlimab/240 mg nivolumab for combination therapy. Treatment-related grade 3-4 adverse events occurred in 6 of 23 patients receiving combination therapy and were not observed with monotherapy. Neoadjuvant administration was associated with increased intratumoral CD8+ T cell infiltration for both monotherapy and combination therapy. Exploratory analyses suggested that tumors with elevated baseline interferon signaling and increased T cell clonality were enriched among patients with durable responses to combination therapy. Twelve-month overall survival was 34.8% with relatlimab alone and 52.2% with combination therapy; however, this study was not designed to assess efficacy. These findings demonstrate an acceptable safety profile and provide preliminary immunologic and clinical signals supporting further evaluation of LAG-3 blockade in GBM. ClinicalTrials.gov identifier: NCT02658981 .
top_journal_neuroscience.title_en: Anti-LAG-3 with or without anti-PD-1 in recurrent glioblastoma: a phase 1 trial.
top_journal_neuroscience.title_cn: 抗 LAG-3 联合或不联合抗 PD-1 治疗复发性胶质母细胞瘤：1 期试验。
top_journal_neuroscience.abstract_cn: 淋巴细胞激活基因 3 (LAG-3) 是一种与 T 细胞耗竭有关的免疫检查点，也是胶质母细胞瘤 (GBM) 的潜在治疗靶点。我们进行了一项多中心、开放标签、序贯分配的 1 期研究，以评估抗 LAG-3 抗体 relatlimab 单独给药或与抗程序性细胞死亡蛋白 1 (PD-1) 抗体 nivolumab 联合给药在复发性 GBM 患者中的安全性和初步活性。 46 名患者接受了治疗（每组 23 名）。达到了安全性的主要终点，单药治疗的最大耐受剂量为 800 mg relatlimab，联合治疗的最大耐受剂量为 160 mg relatlimab/240 mg nivolumab。接受联合治疗的 23 名患者中有 6 名发生了与治疗相关的 3-4 级不良事件，而单药治疗中未观察到这种情况。无论是单一疗法还是联合疗法，新辅助给药均与瘤内 CD8+ T 细胞浸润增加相关。探索性分析表明，对联合治疗有持久反应的患者中，基线干扰素信号传导升高和 T 细胞克隆性增加的肿瘤较多。单独使用 relatlimab 的 12 个月总生存率为 34.8%，联合治疗的 12 个月总生存率为 52.2%；然而，这项研究并不是为了评估疗效。这些研究结果证明了可接受的安全性，并提供了初步的免疫学和临床信号，支持进一步评估 GBM 中的 LAG-3 阻断剂。 ClinicalTrials.gov 标识符：NCT02658981。

top_journal_neuroscience.title: Human embryonic stem cell-derived dopaminergic cells for Parkinson's disease: a phase 1/2 open-label trial.
top_journal_neuroscience.authors: G Paul; H Bjartmarz; A Kirkeby; J Nelander; R Smith; S Kayhanian; A Evans; B Harry
top_journal_neuroscience.abstract: Parkinson's disease (PD) is characterized by progressive loss of nigral dopaminergic neurons, resulting in disabling motor symptoms. Intracerebral transplantation of stem cell-derived dopaminergic progenitors to replace lost endogenous dopaminergic neurons offers a new potentially restorative therapeutic approach for PD. Here we report the 12-month primary safety end point and interim efficacy outcomes from a phase 1/2, open-label, multicenter trial evaluating STEM-PD, a cryopreserved, off-the-shelf dopaminergic progenitor product derived from human pluripotent stem cells. Eight individuals with moderate PD underwent bilateral intraputaminal transplantation at two escalating doses (n = 4 per cohort), followed by 12 months of immunosuppression. Seven participants completed 12-month follow-up; one participant died from a pulmonary infection. No serious adverse events were attributed to the cell product, no graft-induced dyskinesias were observed and serial magnetic resonance imaging showed no evidence of tumor formation. These findings support the feasibility and favorable safety profile of human pluripotent stem cell-derived dopaminergic progenitor transplantation in this early-phase study, with risks primarily associated with the immunosuppression regimen. Ongoing follow-up to 36 months will further evaluate durability, clinical outcomes and graft function. ClinicalTrials.gov identifier: NCT05635409 .
top_journal_neuroscience.title_en: Human embryonic stem cell-derived dopaminergic cells for Parkinson's disease: a phase 1/2 open-label trial.
top_journal_neuroscience.title_cn: 人类胚胎干细胞衍生的多巴胺能细胞治疗帕金森病：1/2 期开放标签试验。
top_journal_neuroscience.abstract_cn: 帕金森病 (PD) 的特点是黑质多巴胺能神经元逐渐丧失，导致运动障碍症状。脑内移植干细胞衍生的多巴胺能祖细胞来替代丢失的内源性多巴胺能神经元，为帕金森病提供了一种新的潜在恢复治疗方法。在此，我们报告了一项 1/2 期、开放标签、多中心试验的 12 个月主要安全终点和中期疗效结果，该试验评估了 STEM-PD，这是一种源自人类多能干细胞的冷冻保存、现成的多巴胺能祖细胞产品。 8 名中度 PD 患者接受了两次递增剂量的双侧壳核内移植（每组 n = 4 例），然后接受 12 个月的免疫抑制。 7 名参与者完成了 12 个月的随访；一名参与者死于肺部感染。细胞产物没有引起严重的不良事件，没有观察到移植物引起的运动障碍，并且连续磁共振成像没有显示肿瘤形成的证据。这些发现支持了这项早期研究中人类多能干细胞衍生的多巴胺能祖细胞移植的可行性和良好的安全性，其风险主要与免疫抑制方案相关。持续随访 36 个月将进一步评估耐久性、临床结果和移植功能。 ClinicalTrials.gov 标识符：NCT05635409。

top_journal_neuroscience.title: Developmental genetic determinants of the human cerebrospinal fluid-ventricular system.
top_journal_neuroscience.authors: Garrett Allington; Evan Dennis; Qiang Li; Stephen McGee; Neel H Mehta; Kedous Y Mekbib; Izuho Hatada; Matthew C Weston
top_journal_neuroscience.abstract: Primary enlargement of the cerebrospinal fluid (CSF)-filled brain ventricles, known as congenital cerebral ventriculomegaly (CCV), is a hallmark of congenital hydrocephalus. CCV is also enigmatically but frequently associated with autism and other neurodevelopmental disorders. To gain insight into the developmental genetic regulation of the human CSF-ventricular system, we conducted an integrated, multiomic study of about 2700 trio-based exomes from patients with primary CCV. We found that about 25% of cases were associated with rare, damaging de novo variants in mutation-intolerant genes, many of which are linked to other dominant Mendelian disorders. Thirty-five exome-wide significant CCV genes and dozens of other high-confidence CCV genes converged on pathways involved in ATP-dependent Brahma-related gene 1/Brahma-associated factor chromatin remodeling, histone H3 lysine 4 methylation, and phosphoinositide 3-kinase signaling. Knockout of selected CCV genes in mouse models supported that de novo variants in CCV genes caused ventriculomegaly by impairing both CSF dynamics and cortical cytoarchitecture through dysregulation of neuroprogenitor cell growth and maturation in the ventricular and subventricular zones. These findings indicated that genetic and epigenetic programs coordinate the "hand-in-glove" development of the CSF-ventricular system with that of the cerebral cortex and establish a genetic connection between CCV and neurodevelopmental disorders, potentially explaining why some patients with hydrocephalus continue to exhibit CCV and neurodevelopmental disorders despite CSF shunting. We suggest that combined brain imaging and whole-exome sequencing could enable early detection of, and intervention for, autism and other neurodevelopmental disorders.
top_journal_neuroscience.title_en: Developmental genetic determinants of the human cerebrospinal fluid-ventricular system.
top_journal_neuroscience.title_cn: 人类脑脊液心室系统的发育遗传决定因素。
top_journal_neuroscience.abstract_cn: 充满脑脊液 (CSF) 的脑室原发性增大，称为先天性脑室扩大 (CCV)，是先天性脑积水的标志。 CCV 也很神秘，但经常与自闭症和其他神经发育障碍相关。为了深入了解人类脑脊液-脑室系统的发育遗传调控，我们对来自原发性 CCV 患者的约 2700 个基于三重体的外显子组进行了一项综合多组学研究。我们发现，大约 25% 的病例与不耐受突变的基因中罕见的、破坏性的从头变异有关，其中许多与其他显性孟德尔疾病有关。 35 个全外显子组显着的 CCV 基因和数十个其他高置信度 CCV 基因聚集在参与 ATP 依赖性 Brahma 相关基因 1/Brahma 相关因子染色质重塑、组蛋白 H3 赖氨酸 4 甲基化和磷酸肌醇 3 激酶信号传导的通路上。在小鼠模型中敲除选定的 CCV 基因支持了 CCV 基因的从头变异通过脑室和脑室下区神经祖细胞生长和成熟失调损害脑脊液动力学和皮质细胞结构而引起脑室扩大。这些发现表明，遗传和表观遗传程序协调脑脊液脑室系统与大脑皮层“密切相关”的发育，并在 CCV 和神经发育障碍之间建立遗传联系，这可能解释了为什么一些脑积水患者尽管存在 CSF 分流，但仍然表现出 CCV 和神经发育障碍。我们认为，结合脑成像和全外显子组测序可以实现自闭症和其他神经发育障碍的早期检测和干预。

top_journal_neuroscience.title: Single-nucleus multiome shows motor neuron glutamate overactivation in amyotrophic lateral sclerosis.
top_journal_neuroscience.authors: Eriko Takeuchi; Yoshiaki Yasumizu; Junko Morita; Masakazu Ishikawa; Kotaro Ogawa; Daisuke Motooka; Daisuke Okuzaki; Miho Nagata
top_journal_neuroscience.abstract: Amyotrophic lateral sclerosis (ALS) is a neurodegenerative disease that causes motor neuron degeneration. However, the mechanisms underlying the selective vulnerability of motor neurons and the involvement of non-motor neuron cells in ALS remain unclear. To investigate ALS pathology at the cellular level, we performed a single-nucleus multiome analysis, including RNA sequencing and chromatin accessibility profiling, on the motor cortex (75 583 nuclei) and spinal cord (62 711 nuclei) from patients with ALS (n = 6) and controls (n = 6). Our results revealed significant gene expression changes specifically in spinal motor neurons, including upregulation of a metabotropic glutamate receptor, GRM5, and enhanced glutamate signalling. By integrating genome-wide association study data, we identified ALS-associated single nucleotide polymorphisms (SNPs) in regulatory regions, suggesting cell-type-specific enrichment of risk, especially in microglia. These findings suggest that changes in spinal motor neurons and their surrounding environment, including glutamate signalling, may be involved in ALS pathology. The study also provides valuable resources for future research on the underlying mechanisms and potential therapeutic targets.
top_journal_neuroscience.title_en: Single-nucleus multiome shows motor neuron glutamate overactivation in amyotrophic lateral sclerosis.
top_journal_neuroscience.title_cn: 单核多组显示肌萎缩侧索硬化症中运动神经元谷氨酸过度激活。
top_journal_neuroscience.abstract_cn: 肌萎缩侧索硬化症（ALS）是一种导致运动神经元变性的神经退行性疾病。然而，运动神经元选择性脆弱性和非运动神经元细胞参与 ALS 的机制仍不清楚。为了在细胞水平上研究 ALS 病理学，我们对 ALS 患者 (n = 6) 和对照 (n = 6) 的运动皮层（75 583 个核）和脊髓（62 711 个核）进行了单核多组分析，包括 RNA 测序和染色质可及性分析。我们的结果揭示了脊髓运动神经元中的显着基因表达变化，包括代谢型谷氨酸受体 GRM5 的上调和谷氨酸信号传导的增强。通过整合全基因组关联研究数据，我们在调控区域鉴定了 ALS 相关的单核苷酸多态性 (SNP)，表明细胞类型特异性的风险富集，尤其是在小胶质细胞中。这些发现表明脊髓运动神经元及其周围环境（包括谷氨酸信号传导）的变化可能与 ALS 病理有关。该研究还为未来研究潜在机制和潜在治疗靶点提供了宝贵的资源。

top_journal_neuroscience.title: Fus-depleted oligodendrocytes reduce neuronal damage and Alzheimer's disease progression in the AppNL-G-F mouse.
top_journal_neuroscience.authors: Te-Hsuan Tung; Sudhagar Babu; Xiangting Tang; Alec L Sciutto; Micah Romer; Prathima Racha; Rong Xu; Victoria Fiesler
top_journal_neuroscience.abstract: Alzheimer's Disease (AD) is an age-dependent neurodegenerative disorder and represents the most common type of dementia, increasing in incidence at an alarming rate in the aging population. The hallmarks of the disease are amyloid plaque accumulation, microglia and astrocyte activation, and loss of presynaptic structure leading to cognitive decline. Recently, oligodendrocyte (OL) and myelin abnormalities have emerged as important contributors to the pathogenesis of AD. In normal brain homeostatic conditions, OL maintain neuronal health through myelin axon interactions and by supplying neurotrophic and metabolic support. How strengthening OL function may support neuronal health in AD neurodegeneration remains to be fully characterized and represents a gap in knowledge and a missed therapeutic opportunity. This study sought to examine how myelin and OL may improve neuronal deficits associated with AD. We have generated a novel mouse model (AD/cKO) by crossing the AppNL-G-F mouse, an established AD model, which carries three human AD mutations in the mouse App gene, with the FusOLcKO whose OL depleted of Fus (Fused in Sarcoma) produce thicker myelin associated with greater cholesterol biosynthesis. We evaluated spatial memory function with standardized cognitive testing. We evaluated microglia density and state, astrocytic activation and toxic phenotype, myelin density, cholesterol content, amyloid plaque burden, presynaptic structures, and neuronal hypoxic and oxidative damage in the hippocampus and cortex. We characterized the transcriptome of AD/cKO hippocampal OL compared to AD by using single-cell transcriptomic studies. Spatial working memory was fully preserved in the aged AD/cKO mouse relative to the AD mouse. This outcome was associated with reduced neuronal oxidative damage, preserved presynaptic structures at the amyloid plaque niches, and a shift in microglia state at the niches in both hippocampus and cortex. In contrast, amyloid plaque burden and microglia density were decreased in the hippocampus but not in cortex, uncoupling the neuronal and microglia effects from the amyloid burden. Fus dependent myelin increase was present in both hippocampus and cortex. Single-cell transcriptomics of AD/cKO hippocampal OL revealed upregulation of energy metabolism and antioxidant genes, suggesting a role of OL enhanced energy metabolism in mediating protection of neurons and affecting microglia state in AD pathology. This work provides new insight into how oligodendrocytes may protect neurons in AD, communicate with other glial cellular players, and point to potential targets for disease intervention aimed at slowing AD progression.
top_journal_neuroscience.title_en: Fus-depleted oligodendrocytes reduce neuronal damage and Alzheimer's disease progression in the AppNL-G-F mouse.

top_journal_neuroscience.abstract_cn: 阿尔茨海默病 (AD) 是一种年龄依赖性神经退行性疾病，是最常见的痴呆类型，在老龄化人口中发病率以惊人的速度增加。该疾病的特点是淀粉样斑块积聚、小胶质细胞和星形胶质细胞激活以及突触前结构丧失导致认知能力下降。最近，少突胶质细胞（OL）和髓磷脂异常已成为 AD 发病机制的重要贡献者。在正常的大脑稳态条件下，OL 通过髓磷脂轴突相互作用以及提供神经营养和代谢支持来维持神经元健康。加强 OL 功能如何支持 AD 神经变性中的神经元健康仍有待充分表征，这代表了知识上的差距和错失的治疗机会。本研究旨在探讨髓磷脂和 OL 如何改善与 AD 相关的神经元缺陷。我们通过将AppNL-G-F小鼠（一种已建立的AD模型，在小鼠App基因中携带三个人类AD突变）与FusOLcKO（其OL耗尽Fus（在肉瘤中融合）产生更厚的髓磷脂，与更多的胆固醇生物合成相关）杂交，产生了一种新型小鼠模型（AD/cKO）。我们通过标准化认知测试评估了空间记忆功能。我们评估了小胶质细胞密度和状态、星形胶质细胞活化和毒性表型、髓磷脂密度、胆固醇含量、淀粉样斑块负荷、突触前结构以及海马和皮层神经元缺氧和氧化损伤。我们通过单细胞转录组研究对 AD/cKO 海马 OL 的转录组与 AD 进行比较。相对于 AD 小鼠，老年 AD/cKO 小鼠的空间工作记忆得到了完全保留。这一结果与神经元氧化损伤的减少、淀粉样蛋白斑块突触前结构的保留以及海马和皮质中小胶质细胞状态的转变有关。相比之下，海马中的淀粉样斑块负荷和小胶质细胞密度降低，但皮质中并未降低，从而将神经元和小胶质细胞的影响与淀粉样蛋白负荷分开。 Fus 依赖性髓鞘质增加出现在海马和……

top_journal_neuroscience.title: Dual tumour-myeloid targeting of glioblastoma with GPNMB CAR-T cells.
top_journal_neuroscience.authors: Neil Savage; Shan Grewal; Muhammad Vaseem Shaikh; Franz J Zemp; Dillon Mckenna; Nicholas Mikolajewicz; Hinda Najem; Joanna Pyczek
top_journal_neuroscience.abstract: Glioblastoma is a lethal brain tumour for which current multimodal treatment rarely prevents recurrence1. Therapeutic failure is driven by extensive intratumoural cellular heterogeneity2 with a microenvironment dominated by tumour-associated macrophages that sustain tumour growth and immunosuppression3. Although chimeric antigen receptor (CAR)-T cell therapies are being developed for glioblastoma, sustained response has been undermined by non-uniform antigen expression, antigen loss and microenvironmental barriers that are not directly engaged by tumour-targeting designs4. These limitations motivate new strategies that address the disease as a coupled tumour-immune system rather than a single malignant compartment. Here we use a multi-omic target discovery platform to identify GPNMB as a dual-compartment antigen in glioblastoma. Anti-GPNMB CAR-T cells showed potent anti-tumour activity, with long-term disease control in orthotopic patient-derived xenografts and syngeneic glioma models through concomitant depletion of GPNMB+ tumour and immunosuppressive myeloid populations. By collapsing tumour control and microenvironmental reprogramming, these findings provide a new strategy for antigen selection and targeting in heterogenous, myeloid-rich solid cancers.
top_journal_neuroscience.title_en: Dual tumour-myeloid targeting of glioblastoma with GPNMB CAR-T cells.
top_journal_neuroscience.title_cn: 使用 GPNMB CAR-T 细胞对胶质母细胞瘤进行双肿瘤-骨髓靶向治疗。
top_journal_neuroscience.abstract_cn: 胶质母细胞瘤是一种致命的脑肿瘤，目前的多模式治疗很少能防止复发1。治疗失败的原因是广泛的肿瘤内细胞异质性2，其微环境以维持肿瘤生长和免疫抑制的肿瘤相关巨噬细胞为主3。尽管针对胶质母细胞瘤的嵌合抗原受体 (CAR)-T 细胞疗法正在开发中，但持续的反应已被不均匀的抗原表达、抗原丢失和与肿瘤靶向设计不直接相关的微环境障碍所破坏。这些限制激发了新的策略，将这种疾病作为一个耦合的肿瘤免疫系统而不是单一的恶性区室来解决。在这里，我们使用多组学靶标发现平台将 GPNMB 鉴定为胶质母细胞瘤中的双室抗原。抗 GPNMB CAR-T 细胞显示出有效的抗肿瘤活性，通过同时消除 GPNMB+ 肿瘤和免疫抑制性骨髓细胞群，在原位患者来源的异种移植物和同基因神经胶质瘤模型中实现长期疾病控制。通过破坏肿瘤控制和微环境重编程，这些发现为异源、富含骨髓的实体癌的抗原选择和靶向提供了新策略。

global_hot_topics.title: Relation between voxel-based specific regional analysis system for Alzheimer's disease (VSRAD) on 3-tesla MRI and cognitive performances: Practical application in clinical settings.
global_hot_topics.authors: K Igase; M Igase; H Matsuda; J Hara; J R Bock; K Sadamoto; W R Shankle
global_hot_topics.abstract: BACKGROUND: Voxel-based specific regional analysis system for Alzheimer's disease (VSRAD) software using MRI scanner allows quantification of hippocampal and parahippocampal atrophy in the medial temporal structures by Z-score, and this score is widely used in clinical Alzheimer's disease (AD) diagnosis. However, it is unclear whether the Z-score is useful to discriminate normal aging from cognitive impairment (CI) or mild cognitive impairment (MCI). The present study examined the associations between VSRAD Z-score and cognitive performance quantified by Memory Performance Index (MPI) and determined a Z-score cut-off value. METHOD: Three-tesla brain MRI was conducted in 100 outpatients without dementia, and all MRI data were analyzed using VSRAD. The target region of interest (ROI) mainly consisted of the para hippocampal gyrus. The degree of atrophy in the ROI was obtained from the averaged positive Z-score of the ROI. Cognitive performance was evaluated with the Japanese version of the MCI screen (MCIS). Patients were classified into normal (NL) and below normal (BNL) cognitive groups by MPI. The relation between MPI and VSRAD Z-score were assessed with logistic regression analysis, and the cut-off value for Z-score was determined by receiver operating characteristic curve analysis. RESULTS: Sixty-two percent (62%) were identified as the BNL group by MPI. Univariate analyses found that the BNL group had a significantly higher age, shorter years of education, and higher Z-score in VSRAD compared to the NL group, but no statistically significant difference was observed between genders. Bivariate correlation found that MPI, which is adjusted for age, gender, and years of education, was significantly correlated with Z-score assessed by VSRAD (Pearson's r = -0.52, p < .001). A subsequent logistic regression of VSRAD Z-score on BNL classification was used to generate a receiver operating characteristic curve (AUC = 0.75). The Youden index was applied to identify a cut-off value of VSRAD Z-score of 1.14 (sensitivity = 62.9%; specificity = 84.2%) to classify MPI < 50.2 (BNL) with overall accuracy of 73.5%. CONCLUSIONS: VSRAD Z-score using VSRAD software was one independent factor significantly associated with cognitive performance measured by MPI. The determination of a cut-off value for Z-score (1.14) that can help discriminate normal patients from those with MCI.

global_hot_topics.title_cn: 3 特斯拉 MRI 上基于体素的阿尔茨海默病特定区域分析系统 (VSRAD) 与认知表现之间的关系：临床环境中的实际应用。
global_hot_topics.abstract_cn: 背景：使用MRI扫描仪的基于体素的阿尔茨海默病特定区域分析系统（VSRAD）软件可以通过Z评分对内侧颞叶结构中的海马和海马旁萎缩进行量化，该评分广泛应用于临床阿尔茨海默病（AD）诊断。然而，尚不清楚 Z 分数是否有助于区分正常衰老与认知障碍 (CI) 或轻度认知障碍 (MCI)。本研究检查了 VSRAD Z 分数与通过记忆表现指数 (MPI) 量化的认知表现之间的关联，并确定了 Z 分数截止值。方法：对100例门诊无痴呆患者进行三特斯拉脑部MRI检查，所有MRI数据均采用VSRAD进行分析。目标感兴趣区域（ROI）主要由海马旁回组成。 ROI 的萎缩程度是从 ROI 的平均正 Z 分数获得的。认知表现通过日本版 MCI 屏幕（MCIS）进行评估。根据 MPI 将患者分为正常（NL）和低于正常（BNL）认知组。通过逻辑回归分析评估MPI和VSRAD Z评分之间的关​​系，并通过受试者工作特征曲线分析确定Z评分的截止值。结果：62% (62%) 被 MPI 识别为 BNL 组。单变量分析发现，与NL组相比，BNL组的年龄显着较高，受教育年限较短，VSRAD Z得分较高，但性别之间没有观察到统计学上的显着差异。双变量相关性发现，根据年龄、性别和受教育年限进行调整后的 MPI 与 VSRAD 评估的 Z 分数显着相关（Pearson's r = -0.52，p < .001）。随后使用 BNL 分类上的 VSRAD Z 分数的逻辑回归来生成受试者工作特征曲线 (AUC = 0.75)。应用 Youden 指数确定 VSRAD Z 分数的截止值为 1.14（敏感性 = 62.9%；特异性 = 84.2%），以对 MPI < 50.2 (BNL) 进行分类，总体准确度为 73.5%。结论：使用 VSRAD 软件的 VSRAD Z 分数是一项独立的……

global_hot_topics.title: A novel deep learning approach for privacy-preserving encoded EEG-based brain-computer interfaces with clinical LLM applications.
global_hot_topics.authors: Taslima Khanam; Siuly Siuly; Kate Wang; Hua Wang
global_hot_topics.abstract: PURPOSE: The rise of large language models (LLMs) such as GPT-4 and DeepSeek has transformed healthcare information processing by enabling natural language-based clinical reasoning. However, the integration of LLMs with privacy-sensitive biomedical signals, particularly electroencephalogram (EEG) data used in brain-computer interface (BCI) systems, remains underexplored. EEG signals, especially during motor imagery (MI) tasks, are critical for assistive neurotechnologies but pose significant privacy risks due to their capacity to reveal cognitive and medical information. Traditional encryption techniques often distort signal structure or require decryption with additional noise, compromising classification performance and real-time usability. METHODS: To address this gap, we propose a deep denoising structure-preserving neural encoding network (DSNet) that enables accurate classification of privacy-preserving encoded EEG representations without requiring decryption. EEG features were extracted using common spatial pattern (CSP) and transformed into privacy-preserving encoded representations while preserving their statistical structure. Here, encoding refers to a non-reversible neural transformation designed for privacy preservation rather than a formal cryptographic guarantee. Two deep learning architectures, a feedforward neural network (NN) and a recurrent neural network (RNN), were evaluated for classification in the encoded feature space. Furthermore, we integrated an LLM (GPT-4) to generate clinical-style summaries based on model outputs, enhancing interpretability for clinician review and potential clinical support use. RESULTS AND CONCLUSION: Using publicly available datasets, DSNet-NN achieved over 87% accuracy for every subject, outperforming both the RNN variant and baseline models. It also demonstrated resilience to simulated privacy attacks. LLM-generated reports provided clinician-friendly interpretations of MI predictions, supporting potential real-world applicability. This study introduces an AI framework that bridges privacy-preserving EEG decoding with LLM-based clinical reasoning, offering a practical solution for privacy-preserving neurorehabilitation and digital health systems.
global_hot_topics.title_en: A novel deep learning approach for privacy-preserving encoded EEG-based brain-computer interfaces with clinical LLM applications.
global_hot_topics.title_cn: 一种新颖的深度学习方法，用于隐私保护编码的基于脑电图的脑机接口与临床法学硕士应用程序。
global_hot_topics.abstract_cn: 目的：GPT-4 和 DeepSeek 等大型语言模型 (LLM) 的兴起通过实现基于自然语言的临床推理，改变了医疗保健信息处理。然而，法学硕士与隐私敏感的生物医学信号的整合，特别是脑机接口（BCI）系统中使用的脑电图（EEG）数据的整合仍有待探索。脑电图信号，尤其是在运动想象 (MI) 任务期间，对于辅助神经技术至关重要，但由于其揭示认知和医疗信息的能力，会带来重大的隐私风险。传统的加密技术通常会扭曲信号结构或需要使用额外噪声进行解密，从而损害分类性能和实时可用性。方法：为了解决这一差距，我们提出了一种深度去噪结构保留神经编码网络（DSNet），它能够对隐私保护编码脑电图表示进行准确分类，而无需解密。使用通用空间模式（CSP）提取脑电图特征，并将其转换为保护隐私的编码表示，同时保留其统计结构。这里，编码是指为隐私保护而设计的不可逆神经变换，而不是正式的密码学保证。评估了两种深度学习架构，即前馈神经网络 (NN) 和循环神经网络 (RNN)，以在编码特征空间中进行分类。此外，我们集成了法学硕士 (GPT-4)，以根据模型输出生成临床风格的摘要，从而增强临床医生审查和潜在临床支持用途的可解释性。结果和结论：使用公开可用的数据集，DSNet-NN 对每个受试者的准确率都超过 87%，优于 RNN 变体模型和基线模型。它还表现出了对模拟隐私攻击的抵御能力。法学硕士生成的报告为 MI 预测提供了临床医生友好的解释，支持潜在的现实应用性。本研究引入了一种人工智能框架，将保护隐私的脑电图解码与基于法学硕士的临床推理联系起来，为保护隐私的神经康复提供了实用的解决方案……

global_hot_topics.title: Immune regulatory mechanisms and potential microbiota-associated targets in Kawasaki disease: an integrative multi-omics and network pharmacology study.
global_hot_topics.abstract: Kawasaki disease (KD) is a systemic vasculitis in children primarily affecting the coronary arteries, and studies suggest that the gut microbiota may be involved in KD pathogenesis, inflammatory responses, and immune regulation. This study employed an integrative multi-omics strategy to systematically investigate gut microbiota-metabolite interactions in KD. Key molecular targets were identified using network-based analyses and machine learning models, with Mendelian randomization providing causal validation. Single-cell transcriptomics and molecular docking further elucidated immune cell interactions and metabolite-protein binding, highlighting critical regulatory pathways. We identified SELP as a core molecular target in KD, predominantly expressed in platelets and involved in immune and inflammatory responses. Gut microbiota-derived metabolites, including palmitoylethanolamide, pantothenic acid, and 1-O-caffeoylglycerol, may regulate immune cell interactions via the RESISTIN signalling pathway. Altered abundances of microbial taxa such as Bacteroides, Parabacteroides, and Bifidobacterium suggest their potential role in inflammation modulation. Activation of IL-17, TNF, MAPK, and PI3K-Akt pathways further contributes to disease progression, highlighting the microbiota-metabolite-SELP axis as a potential therapeutic target in KD. These findings lay the groundwork for subsequent in vitro and in vivo studies, advancing the development of microbiome-based intervention strategies.
global_hot_topics.title_en: Immune regulatory mechanisms and potential microbiota-associated targets in Kawasaki disease: an integrative multi-omics and network pharmacology study.
global_hot_topics.title_cn: 川崎病的免疫调节机制和潜在的微生物相关靶标：一项综合多组学和网络药理学研究。
global_hot_topics.abstract_cn: 川崎病 (KD) 是一种主要影响冠状动脉的儿童系统性血管炎，研究表明肠道微生物群可能参与 KD 发病机制、炎症反应和免疫调节。本研究采用综合多组学策略来系统地研究川崎病中肠道微生物群与代谢物的相互作用。使用基于网络的分析和机器学习模型确定了关键分子靶点，并通过孟德尔随机化提供因果验证。单细胞转录组学和分子对接进一步阐明了免疫细胞相互作用和代谢物-蛋白质结合，突出了关键的调控途径。我们将 SELP 确定为 KD 的核心分子靶点，主要在血小板中表达并参与免疫和炎症反应。肠道微生物群衍生的代谢物，包括棕榈酰乙醇酰胺、泛酸和 1-O-咖啡酰甘油，可能通过 RESISTIN 信号通路调节免疫细胞相互作用。拟杆菌属、副拟杆菌属和双歧杆菌等微生物类群丰度的改变表明它们在炎症调节中的潜在作用。 IL-17、TNF、MAPK 和 PI3K-Akt 通路的激活进一步促进疾病进展，凸显微生物群-代谢物-SELP 轴作为 KD 的潜在治疗靶点。这些发现为后续的体外和体内研究奠定了基础，推动了基于微生物组的干预策略的发展。

global_hot_topics.title: POU2F2 as a dual oncogenic and immunomodulatory driver in kidney renal clear cell carcinoma.
global_hot_topics.authors: Gonglin Tang; Fei Liu; Mingze Sun; Chenyue Liu; Jitao Wu; Hongwei Zhao
global_hot_topics.abstract: Kidney renal clear cell carcinoma (KIRC) features an immunosuppressive tumor microenvironment (TME). We investigated the role of transcription factor POU2F2 in KIRC oncogenesis and macrophage polarization. Single-cell and spatial transcriptomics showed that POU2F2 is upregulated in KIRC and associated with metastasis and poor prognosis. POU2F2 knockdown inhibited KIRC cell proliferation, migration, and invasion in vitro. POU2F2 expression correlated with macrophage infiltration and JAK-STAT signaling. Co-culture assays showed that POU2F2 silencing reduced macrophage recruitment and shifted M2 polarization toward an anti-tumor M1 phenotype. Overall, POU2F2 acts as an oncogenic driver and prognostic biomarker in KIRC, promoting an immunosuppressive TME and representing a potential therapeutic target.
global_hot_topics.title_en: POU2F2 as a dual oncogenic and immunomodulatory driver in kidney renal clear cell carcinoma.
global_hot_topics.title_cn: POU2F2 作为肾透明细胞癌的双重致癌和免疫调节驱动因素。
global_hot_topics.abstract_cn: 肾透明细胞癌 (KIRC) 具有免疫抑制肿瘤微环境 (TME)。我们研究了转录因子 POU2F2 在 KIRC 肿瘤发生和巨噬细胞极化中的作用。单细胞和空间转录组学表明 POU2F2 在 KIRC 中表达上调，并与转移和不良预后相关。 POU2F2 敲低可抑制 KIRC 细胞的体外增殖、迁移和侵袭。 POU2F2 表达与巨噬细胞浸润和 JAK-STAT 信号传导相关。共培养测定表明，POU2F2 沉默减少了巨噬细胞的招募，并将 M2 极化转向抗肿瘤 M1 表型。总体而言，POU2F2 在 KIRC 中充当致癌驱动因素和预后生物标志物，促进免疫抑制性 TME 并代表潜在的治疗靶点。

global_hot_topics.title: Multi-omics profiling identifies CDK1 as a key mediator of mitosis through the PTN pathway in bladder cancer.
global_hot_topics.authors: Li Yang; Jia-Ming Zhang; Yu-Jia Chen; Zhong-Qiong Wei; Mei Zhou; Guo-Qiang Chen; Yu-Xian He; Zhi-Guang Huang
global_hot_topics.abstract: AIMS: This study aimed to characterize cyclin-dependent kinase 1 (CDK1) expression in bladder cancer (BC), elucidate its role in intercellular signaling and mitosis, and identify small-molecule inhibitors targeting CDK1. METHODS: RNA sequencing data from multiple databases were integrated, with immunohistochemistry on tissue microarrays validating protein expression. Single-cell RNA sequencing (scRNA-seq), spatial transcriptomics (ST), gene set enrichment analysis (GSEA), and molecular docking with molecular dynamics (MD) simulations were performed. RESULTS: CDK1 mRNA and protein were significantly overexpressed in BC tissues. CDK1 expression correlated with patient age and race. CDK1 was predominantly expressed in epithelial cells and central to pleiotrophin (PTN) pathway-mediated intercellular communication; virtual CDK1 knockout markedly reduced PTN signaling strength. ST confirmed CDK1 enrichment in tumor regions. GSEA linked CDK1 to mitosis and chromosome segregation, and scRNA-seq analyses revealed a PTN-CDK1-mitosis regulatory axis active specifically in epithelial cells. Dinaciclib showed favorable MD stability as a CDK1 inhibitor. CONCLUSION: CDK1 is significantly overexpressed in BC with good discriminatory ability. Predominantly expressed in BC epithelial cells, CDK1 may be activated by PTN signaling to drive mitosis. MD simulations support Dinaciclib as a promising CDK1-targeting inhibitor. Bladder cancer is one of the most common cancers of the urinary tract worldwide. Many patients face a difficult challenge: after standard treatments, tumors frequently come back, and existing targeted therapies work for only a small proportion of people. There is therefore an urgent need to better understand what drives bladder cancer growth and to find new treatment targets.This study focused on a protein called CDK1, which acts like a molecular “switch” controlling how and when cells divide. Using data from hundreds of bladder cancer tissue samples across multiple international databases, alongside laboratory staining experiments on tumor tissue, we confirmed that CDK1 levels are significantly higher in bladder cancer than in normal bladder tissue, and that CDK1 can reliably distinguish cancerous from healthy tissue.By examining individual cancer cells using advanced single-cell technologies, we found that CDK1 is concentrated mainly in the lining cells of the bladder tumor. We also identified that a signaling molecule called PTN appears to “switch on” CDK1 in these cells, which in turn drives tumor cells to divide and multiply more rapidly.Finally, using computer-based drug-screening methods, we identified Dinaciclib as a particularly promising molecule capable of blocking CDK1 activity, with stable binding behavior confirmed by computer simulations.
global_hot_topics.title_en: Multi-omics profiling identifies CDK1 as a key mediator of mitosis through the PTN pathway in bladder cancer.
global_hot_topics.title_cn: 多组学分析确定 CDK1 是膀胱癌中通过 PTN 途径有丝分裂的关键介质。
global_hot_topics.abstract_cn: 目的：本研究旨在表征膀胱癌 (BC) 中细胞周期蛋白依赖性激酶 1 (CDK1) 的表达，阐明其在细胞间信号传导和有丝分裂中的作用，并鉴定针对 CDK1 的小分子抑制剂。方法：整合来自多个数据库的 RNA 测序数据，并通过组织微阵列上的免疫组织化学验证蛋白质表达。进行了单细胞 RNA 测序 (scRNA-seq)、空间转录组学 (ST)、基因集富集分析 (GSEA) 以及分子对接与分子动力学 (MD) 模拟。结果：CDK1 mRNA 和蛋白在 BC 组织中显着过表达。 CDK1 表达与患者年龄和种族相关。 CDK1 主要在上皮细胞中表达，并且是多效蛋白 (PTN) 途径介导的细胞间通讯的核心；虚拟 CDK1 敲除显着降低了 PTN 信号强度。 ST 证实了肿瘤区域 CDK1 富集。 GSEA 将 CDK1 与有丝分裂和染色体分离联系起来，scRNA-seq 分析揭示了 PTN-CDK1-有丝分裂调节轴在上皮细胞中特别活跃。 Dinaciclib 作为 CDK1 抑制剂表现出良好的 MD 稳定性。结论：CDK1在BC中显着过表达，具有良好的辨别能力。 CDK1 主要在 BC 上皮细胞中表达，可通过 PTN 信号传导激活以驱动有丝分裂。 MD 模拟支持 Dinaciclib 作为一种有前途的 CDK1 靶向抑制剂。膀胱癌是全世界最常见的泌尿道癌症之一。许多患者面临着一个艰巨的挑战：标准治疗后，肿瘤经常复发，而现有的靶向治疗只对一小部分人有效。因此，迫切需要更好地了解膀胱癌生长的驱动因素并找到新的治疗靶点。这项研究重点关注一种名为 CDK1 的蛋白质，它的作用就像一个控制细胞分裂方式和时间的分子“开关”。使用来自多个国际数据库的数百个膀胱癌组织样本的数据，结合肿瘤组织的实验室染色实验，我们证实膀胱癌中的 CDK1 水平显着高于正常膀胱组织，并且 CDK1……

global_hot_topics.title: TTC7A deficiency: A retrospective international study on treatment and outcomes from the Inborn Errors Working Party of EBMT.
global_hot_topics.authors: Giulia Prunotto; Marie Parreillet; Bénédicte Neven; Despina Moshous; Genevieve de Saint Basile; Caroline Lindemans; Timothy Ronan Leahy; Elie Haddad
global_hot_topics.abstract: Tetratricopeptide repeat domain 7A (TTC7A) deficiency is a primary immunodeficiency due to mutations in the TTC7A gene. It causes intestinal disease and a poorly characterized immunodeficiency, with poor long-term survival. We describe the clinical and immunological characteristics, management, and outcomes of an international cohort of patients with genetically confirmed TTC7A deficiency. Data from 61 patients from 13 countries were retrospectively analyzed. Overall survival was 64% (median follow-up 4.2 years), significantly higher in the inflammatory bowel disease than in the hereditary multiple intestinal atresia group (80 vs. 48%, P < 0.05). Infections represent the leading cause of death. Allogeneic stem cell transplantation was performed in 16 patients to correct the immunodeficiency but was associated with a significant transplant-related mortality (44%). Solid organ transplantation of the small bowel remains exceptionally rare (two patients). Malignancy/autoimmune disorders developed in 4 (6.5%) and 17 (28%) patients, respectively. TTC7A remains difficult to treat, and prognosis is dismal for affected patients. Further understanding of the disease mechanisms and development of innovative treatment approaches are required.
global_hot_topics.title_en: TTC7A deficiency: A retrospective international study on treatment and outcomes from the Inborn Errors Working Party of EBMT.
global_hot_topics.title_cn: TTC7A 缺乏症：EBMT 先天性缺陷工作组对治疗和结果进行的一项回顾性国际研究。
global_hot_topics.abstract_cn: 四肽重复结构域 7A (TTC7A) 缺陷是由于 TTC7A 基因突变引起的原发性免疫缺陷。它会导致肠道疾病和特征不明的免疫缺陷，导致长期生存率较差。我们描述了一组经基因证实的 TTC7A 缺陷的国际患者的临床和免疫学特征、治疗和结果。对来自 13 个国家的 61 名患者的数据进行了回顾性分析。炎症性肠病组的总生存率为 64%（中位随访时间 4.2 年），显着高于遗传性多发性肠闭锁组（80% vs. 48%，P < 0.05）。感染是导致死亡的主要原因。对 16 名患者进行了同种异体干细胞移植以纠正免疫缺陷，但移植相关死亡率较高（44%）。小肠实体器官移植仍然非常罕见（两名患者）。分别有 4 名 (6.5%) 和 17 名 (28%) 患者出现恶性肿瘤/自身免疫性疾病。 TTC7A 仍然难以治疗，受影响患者的预后很差。需要进一步了解疾病机制并开发创新的治疗方法。

global_hot_topics.title: CXCL12-abundant reticular cell lineage is the key source of endosteal osteoblasts and adipocytes in adult bone marrow.
global_hot_topics.authors: Takumi Shibahara; Katsutoshi Hirose; Makoto Abe; Yu Usami; Miho Hyodo; Yoshiaki Hayashi; Daisuke Motooka; Kanta Wakamori
global_hot_topics.abstract: INTRODUCTION: CXCL12-abundant reticular (CAR) cells, characterized by high expression of CXCL12, are perisinusoidal bone marrow stromal cells that establish the hematopoietic stem cell niche. Although CAR cells are postulated to become precursor cells of both osteoblasts and adipocytes, the spatiotemporal dynamics of CAR cells-particularly their contribution to osteoblasts-remain poorly understood. Here, we defined the contribution of the endogenous Cxcl12-expressing (Cxcl12+) lineage to the skeleton from development to adulthood. METHODS: A novel Cxcl12-Cre knock-in mouse model was generated that allows permanent lineage tracing of CAR cells and their progeny. RESULTS: Lineage tracing revealed that the Cxcl12+ lineage arose perinatally and was initially localized around sinusoids in the bone marrow. During aging, these cells expanded and progressively populated non-sinusoidal regions distal to the sinusoids. While the contribution of the lineage to osteogenesis was negligible during postnatal growth, the lineage accounted for over 60% of endosteal osteoblasts in both cortical and trabecular bones in skeletally mature adult mice. Additionally, the lineage gave rise to the majority of bone marrow adipocytes. This lineage did not contribute to periosteal osteoblasts or extra-bone adipocytes. Furthermore, intermittent administration of the anabolic agent parathyroid hormone significantly promoted osteoblast differentiation from this lineage. Single-cell RNA sequencing confirmed the presence of both osteogenic and adipogenic precursors within the traced population. CONCLUSIONS: The Cxcl12-expression-based lineage tracing approach revealed the CAR cell lineage as the key source of endosteal osteoblasts and adipocytes in adult bone marrow, suggesting their important role in skeletal homeostasis. This lineage may represent a promising therapeutic target for age-related bone diseases.
global_hot_topics.title_en: CXCL12-abundant reticular cell lineage is the key source of endosteal osteoblasts and adipocytes in adult bone marrow.
global_hot_topics.title_cn: CXCL12丰富的网状细胞谱系是成人骨髓中骨内成骨细胞和脂肪细胞的关键来源。
global_hot_topics.abstract_cn: 简介：CXCL12 丰富的网状 (CAR) 细胞以 CXCL12 高表达为特征，是建立造血干细胞生态位的窦周骨髓基质细胞。尽管 CAR 细胞被假定为成骨细胞和脂肪细胞的前体细胞，但 CAR 细胞的时空动态（特别是它们对成骨细胞的贡献）仍然知之甚少。在这里，我们定义了内源性 Cxcl12 表达 (Cxcl12+) 谱系对从发育到成年的骨骼的贡献。方法：建立了一种新型 Cxcl12-Cre 敲入小鼠模型，该模型允许对 CAR 细胞及其后代进行永久谱系追踪。结果：谱系追踪显示，Cxcl12+谱系在围产期出现，最初位于骨髓中的血窦周围。在衰老过程中，这些细胞扩张并逐渐聚集在正弦波远端的非正弦波区域。虽然该谱系在出生后生长过程中对成骨的贡献可以忽略不计，但在骨骼成熟的成年小鼠的皮质骨和小梁骨中，该谱系占骨内成骨细胞的60%以上。此外，该谱系产生了大多数骨髓脂肪细胞。该谱系对骨膜成骨细胞或骨外脂肪细胞没有贡献。此外，间歇性施用合成代谢剂甲状旁腺激素显着促进了该谱系的成骨细胞分化。单细胞 RNA 测序证实了所追踪的群体中存在成骨和脂肪前体。结论：基于 Cxcl12 表达的谱系追踪方法揭示了 CAR 细胞谱系是成人骨髓中骨内成骨细胞和脂肪细胞的关键来源，表明它们在骨骼稳态中的重要作用。该谱系可能代表与年龄相关的骨疾病的有前景的治疗靶点。

核心发现：简介：CXCL12 丰富的网状 (CAR) 细胞以 CXCL12 高表达为特征，是建立造血干细胞生态位的窦周骨髓基质细胞。尽管 CAR 细胞被假定为成骨细胞和脂肪细胞的前体细胞，但 CAR 细胞的时空动态（特别是它们对成骨细胞的贡献）仍然知之甚少。在这里，我们定义了内源性 Cxcl12 表达 (Cxcl12+) 谱系对从发育到成年的骨骼的贡献。方法：建立了一种新型 Cxcl12-Cre 敲入小鼠模型，该模型允许对 CAR 细胞及其后代进行永久谱系追踪。结果：谱系追踪显示，Cxcl12+谱系在围产期出现，最初位于骨髓中的血窦周围。在衰老过程中，这些细胞扩张并逐渐聚集在正弦波远端的非正弦波区域。虽然该谱系在出生后生长过程中对成骨的贡献可以忽略不计，但在骨骼成熟的成年小鼠的皮质骨和小梁骨中，该谱系占骨内成骨细胞的60%以上。此外，该谱系产生了大多数骨髓脂肪细胞。该谱系对骨膜成骨细胞或骨外脂肪细胞没有贡献。此外，间歇性施用合成代谢剂甲状旁腺激素显着促进了该谱系的成骨细胞分化。单细胞 RNA 测序证实了所追踪的群体中存在成骨和脂肪前体。结论：基于 Cxcl12 表达的谱系追踪方法揭示了 CAR 细胞谱系是成人骨髓中骨内成骨细胞和脂肪细胞的关键来源，表明它们在骨骼稳态中的重要作用。该谱系可能代表与年龄相关的骨疾病的有前景的治疗靶点。

global_hot_topics.title: Real-time sensing-integrated organoid-on-a-chip platforms: Technological progress and emerging biomedical applications.
global_hot_topics.authors: Chenwei Sun; Guohua Wu; Di Wu; Qijun Du; Qingrui Lu; Wenqi Hu; Jiashu Wang; Ao Xie
global_hot_topics.abstract: As micro-scale 3D tissues self-organized from stem cells, organoids can highly recapitulate the cellular composition and complex spatial architecture of human organs, establishing themselves as pivotal physiological models in biomedical research. Although organoids offer significant advantages in mimicking human physiological structures, traditional monitoring methodologies predominantly rely on destructive endpoint assays, which fail to capture the transient fluctuations inherent in biological processes. To overcome this limitation, we propose the sensing-integrated organoid-on-a-chip, a frontier interdisciplinary platform. This review systematically outlines the comprehensive construction of this platform, focusing on the synergistic integration of microenvironmental engineering and real-time sensing technologies. The article provides an in-depth analysis of real-time monitoring facilitated by high-performance electrical, optical, and mechanical sensors to quantify organoid developmental maturation, metabolic fluctuations, and pathological evolution. We emphasize the application potential of this platform across developmental biology, disease modeling, drug screening, and neuroscience exploration. Furthermore, we discuss the integration of closed-loop feedback regulation systems and artificial intelligence-assisted analysis, while outlining the trajectory of this platform toward clinical precision medicine and industrial standardization. We firmly believe that sensing-integrated organoid-on-a-chip platforms will accelerate the advancement of personalized diagnosis and therapeutics, thereby ushering in a new era of dynamic biomedical research and intelligent healthcare.
global_hot_topics.title_en: Real-time sensing-integrated organoid-on-a-chip platforms: Technological progress and emerging biomedical applications.
global_hot_topics.title_cn: 实时传感集成类器官芯片平台：技术进步和新兴生物医学应用。
global_hot_topics.abstract_cn: 作为由干细胞自组织的微型 3D 组织，类器官可以高度概括人体器官的细胞组成和复杂的空间结构，使其成为生物医学研究中的关键生理模型。尽管类器官在模仿人类生理结构方面具有显着优势，但传统的监测方法主要依赖于破坏性终点检测，无法捕获生物过程中固有的瞬时波动。为了克服这一限制，我们提出了传感集成芯片类器官，这是一个前沿跨学科平台。本文系统地概述了该平台的全面建设，重点关注微环境工程与实时传感技术的协同集成。该文章对高性能电气、光学和机械传感器促进的实时监测进行了深入分析，以量化类器官的发育成熟、代谢波动和病理进化。我们强调该平台在发育生物学、疾病建模、药物筛选和神经科学探索方面的应用潜力。此外，我们讨论了闭环反馈调节系统和人工智能辅助分析的集成，同时概述了该平台走向临床精准医学和行业标准化的轨迹。我们坚信，传感集成类器官芯片平台将加速个性化诊断和治疗的进步，从而开创动态生物医学研究和智能医疗的新时代。

medical_news.title: Scientists say creatine may help fight depression
medical_news.abstract: Creatine is best known as a muscle-building supplement, but scientists are now investigating whether it could also help treat depression by boosting the brain's energy supply. A new review examined five randomized clinical trials involving 238 participants and found mixed results. Two studies, both involving women with major depressive disorder, reported that adding creatine to standard treatment improved symptoms, while three others found no meaningful benefit.
medical_news.title_en: Scientists say creatine may help fight depression
medical_news.title_cn: 科学家称肌酸可能有助于对抗抑郁症
medical_news.abstract_cn: 肌酸最著名的是一种肌肉增强补充剂，但科学家们现在正在研究它是否也可以通过增加大脑的能量供应来帮助治疗抑郁症。一项新的综述审查了 5 项涉及 238 名参与者的随机临床试验，发现结果好坏参半。两项研究均涉及患有重度抑郁症的女性，报告称在标准治疗中添加肌酸可以改善症状，而其他三项研究则没有发现任何有意义的益处。

medical_news.title: NFL Players Face Fourfold Increase in Neurodegenerative Mortality
medical_news.abstract: A retrospective cohort study of 19,824 NFL players confirms that professional football veterans face a fourfold increase in neurodegenerative mortality, including a 3.8-fold surge in all-cause dementia and Parkinson's disease.

medical_news.title: Tiny silica particles wiped out aggressive prostate cancer in mice
medical_news.abstract: Tiny silica nanoparticles engineered to seek out prostate cancer caused tumor cells to self-destruct and supercharged the immune system in preclinical mouse studies. Combined with immunotherapy, the treatment produced complete remissions in multiple mice, raising hopes for a powerful new approach to prostate cancer.
medical_news.title_en: Tiny silica particles wiped out aggressive prostate cancer in mice

medical_news.title: A hidden immune backup system could supercharge mRNA cancer vaccines
medical_news.abstract: Researchers found that mRNA cancer vaccines can recruit an unexpected immune cell to launch powerful tumor-fighting responses, overturning a long-held assumption about how the vaccines work. The discovery could lead to more effective cancer vaccines and help scientists tailor treatments for better patient outcomes.
medical_news.title_en: A hidden immune backup system could supercharge mRNA cancer vaccines

medical_news.abstract_cn: 研究人员发现，mRNA 癌症疫苗可以招募意想不到的免疫细胞来发起强大的抗肿瘤反应，推翻了长期以来关于疫苗如何发挥作用的假设。这一发现可能会带来更有效的癌症疫苗，并帮助科学家定制治疗方案以改善患者的治疗效果。

medical_news.title: Brain activity under anesthesia challenges what we know about consciousness
medical_news.abstract: The unconscious brain appears to be far more capable than scientists once believed. Researchers found that patients under general anesthesia could still process language at a sophisticated level, distinguishing nouns, verbs, and adjectives while listening to stories. Even more remarkably, neural activity showed signs of predicting upcoming words before they were heard. The results challenge traditional ideas about consciousness and hint at new possibilities for brain-computer interfaces.
medical_news.title_en: Brain activity under anesthesia challenges what we know about consciousness
medical_news.title_cn: 麻醉下的大脑活动挑战了我们对意识的了解
medical_news.abstract_cn: 无意识的大脑似乎比科学家曾经认为的更有能力。研究人员发现，全身麻醉下的患者在听故事时仍然可以复杂地处理语言，区分名词、动词和形容词。更值得注意的是，神经活动显示出在听到即将到来的单词之前就对其进行预测的迹象。这些结果挑战了关于意识的传统观念，并暗示了脑机接口的新可能性。

medical_news.title: Scientists may have finally found how Alzheimer's kills brain cells
medical_news.abstract: Researchers have identified a previously overlooked mechanism of brain cell death that appears to play a major role in Alzheimer's disease and frontotemporal dementia. The finding could lead to new treatments aimed at slowing neuron loss by interrupting the process before cells are destroyed.
medical_news.title_en: Scientists may have finally found how Alzheimer's kills brain cells

medical_news.abstract_cn: 研究人员发现了一种以前被忽视的脑细胞死亡机制，它似乎在阿尔茨海默病和额颞叶痴呆中发挥着重要作用。这一发现可能会带来新的治疗方法，旨在通过在细胞被破坏之前中断这一过程来减缓神经元的损失。

medical_news.title: Experimental drug reverses severe fatty liver disease by repairing the gut
medical_news.abstract: An experimental drug called DT-109 reversed severe fatty liver disease in animal studies by repairing the gut and preventing harmful toxins from damaging the liver. The discovery could open the door to a new class of treatments for MASH and potentially other diseases tied to gut health.
medical_news.title_en: Experimental drug reverses severe fatty liver disease by repairing the gut
medical_news.title_cn: 实验药物通过修复肠道逆转严重脂肪肝疾病
medical_news.abstract_cn: 在动物研究中，一种名为 DT-109 的实验药物通过修复肠道并防止有害毒素损害肝脏，逆转了严重的脂肪肝疾病。这一发现可能为 MASH 以及其他与肠道健康相关疾病的新型治疗方法打开大门。
